title: Shaded War / FPV / SHAHED
description: Introduces realistic FPV drones and tactical loitering munitions, featuring advanced flight physics, signal jamming, and remote control systems. Shahed
body:
![Showcase of equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd93da3d1ae52d84da7c5b09149b79ddf0cc925.png)

![Showcase of equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLOHh3Kg/images/9fb704678b188bcd2c724b93c40c405668e9d109.jpeg)

**BETA WARNING**
>
> This mod is for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge). It is currently in beta and may contain bugs. Please back up your worlds.

## Overview

Shaded War introduces high-fidelity aerial combat systems to Minecraft. Experience FPV drones with realistic physics and long-range tactical munitions. The mod focuses on technical immersion, signal simulation, shahed-136, and electronic warfare.

## Features

*   **FPV Drones**
    Flight physics ("Acro" mode), battery management, and dynamic signal quality based on distance and obstacles.

*   **Loitering Munitions**
    Long-range UAVs with dedicated launchers, fuel consumption, and aerodynamic simulation.

*   **Electronic Warfare**
    Signal jammers (REB) that disrupt control links and disable drones within range.

*   **Equipment**
    Goggles, Controllers, and Monitoring Stations with digital HUDs and interference effects.

**Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib).**
